title: dubautia microcephala
intro: Dubautia microcephala, also known as Ma'o, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Dubautia microcephala is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and potentially aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
